headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Extra Space Storage, Raises Price Target to $155
summary: Mizuho  analyst Ravi Vaidya   maintains Extra Space Storage (NYSE:EXR) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $150 to $155.
